title: Origins - Skyfallen
description: Play as the Skyfallen, an Origin themed around being a sentient meteor!
body:
# Showcase
<iframe width="1536" height="562" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/a6-0JBKTUHw" title="Skyfallen - Minecraft Origins Mod Showcase" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Skyfallen 🔴🔴🔴
### *"You are the Skyfallen, a mysterious being originating from the skies above."*

🟢 Cosmic Impact - *"Channel your inner power, propelling yourself through the air and causing an explosive blast upon landing."*
> Press the primary key to launch yourself into the air, hovering for 1.75 seconds, after which you will be launched with great force in the direction you are looking.
> 
> On impact, cause an explosion that deals 10 damage to all surrounding entities and launches them away from you.
> 
> Clears levitation on use.
> 
> You do not take damage from this ability.
>
> Cooldown: 25 Seconds

🟢 Meteorskin - *"Through the process of biomineralization, your flesh has come to be made of a tough, incombustible substance."*
> +4 Armor
> 
> +25% Knockback Resistance
> 
> You cannot catch on fire.

🟢 Rebounding - *"Your body is fantastic at reflecting minor impacts."*
> Melee attacks dealt to you knock your attacker back slightly.

🟡 Metabolic Efficiency - *"You have adapted in a way that causes you to get hungry significantly more slowly than your peers, but takes you much longer to properly process food."*
> -50% Hunger Loss
> 
> -30% Saturation/Hunger from Eating

🔴 Cumbersome - *"The density of your armored flesh hinders your movement in a variety of ways."*
> +25% Falling Speed
> 
> -10% Attack Speed
> 
> -5% Sprinting Speed
> 
> You cannot swim.
> 
> You cannot glide with an elytra.

🔴 Extinction Event - *"You hail from the stars, something alien to this world. Your arrival is as devastating as it is wonderous."*
> You spawn/respawn in the air above build limit.
> 
> When you land, you will cause a moderately sized destructive explosion.
> 
> You do not take damage from this ability.

🔴 Realmbound - *"Only under the endless expanse of the true sky can your soul find its way back to the living realm."*
> You cannot set your spawn point in any dimension but the Overworld.
